column1: #mapping_set_description: Mappings from Skygest Energy Vocabulary concepts to Wikidata entities for label harvesting and interoperability

column8: Wikidata models the station; sevocab models the technology facet
Wikidata models the farm/installation; sevocab models the energy source
Wikidata is the device; sevocab is the technology facet
Wikidata models the substance; sevocab models the fuel facet
Wikidata models the element; sevocab models the tech/fuel facet
Wikidata has broader scope (includes heat, transport)
Wikidata is the thermodynamic cycle; sevocab is the plant type
